summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Facts Are Foes premium features. All new social sharing, engagement tracking, and admin panel features are fully functional. Backend APIs working perfectly with 40/41 tests passing. Frontend UI properly displays all premium features with Egyptian space theme maintained.
passed_tests: All engagement tracking APIs working (POST /api/engagement for view, share, time_spent)
Admin authentication properly restricts access to first user and admin emails
Social share buttons render correctly on fact detail pages (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Copy)
View count tracking displays correctly on fact detail pages
Share button engagement tracking works (copy link functionality tested)
Admin panel UI loads correctly with stats cards, engagement timeline, and tabs
Admin panel tabs (Facts, Users, Top Performing) all functional
Admin action buttons (feature toggle, delete) present and accessible
Admin panel requires proper authentication (redirects unauthorized users)
Egyptian space theme maintained throughout all new features
All voting and AI explanation features still working
Navigation and user authentication flow working correctly
